mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate held near the zero lower bound signals persistently accommodative monetary policy, lowering the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows and supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS=0.18 as of Jan 2016, near zero lower bound
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20-day SPX returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or returns during near-zero rate periods are not statistically higher than full-sample baseline (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate of more than 0.3 percentage points over a rolling 3-month window signals deteriorating labor market conditions that precede consumption slowdown and corporate earnings downgrades, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day forward returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC between the UNRATE trigger and forward returns is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production growth and retail sales growth are simultaneously positive over a 3-month window, the joint confirmation of production and demand strength signals a synchronized expansion phase that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month. Neither series alone is sufficient; the co-movement is the signal.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns conditional on joint positive INDPRO and RSAFS growth are not significantly higher than returns conditional on either series alone being positive (p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During an early-cycle housing recovery, rising housing starts signal renewed construction and durable goods demand that propagates through the economy with a lag, supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the following quarter. The effect is expected to be weak or absent outside early-cycle recovery regimes.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 3-month moving average rises for 2 consecutive months
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST=549.0 thousand units as of Dec 2015
failure_condition: The positive relationship between rising HOUST and forward 60-day SPX returns disappears or reverses when tested outside early-cycle regimes, or Rank IC < 0.03 within identified early-cycle windows.

mechanism_narrative: A persistent positive month-over-month trend in industrial production reflects ongoing real economic expansion that is incorporated into equity prices with a short lag, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next trading week.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO trend and forward 5-day SPX returns is below 0.02 over any rolling 1-year window, or the sign of the correlation flips across more than half of rolling windows tested.

mechanism_narrative: A deceleration in retail sales growth below zero year-over-year signals weakening consumer demand, the largest component of GDP, and precedes downward earnings revisions that drag on S&P 500 prices over the following month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window during triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises while CPI inflation remains flat or declining, the implied real interest rate increases, tightening financial conditions and raising the discount rate on equities, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following quarter. Neither the nominal rate nor inflation alone captures this effect; their joint divergence is the signal.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises while CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change falls below prior quarter average
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns conditional on rising real rates (FEDFUNDS up, CPI flat/down) are not significantly lower than unconditional baseline returns (p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained positive month-over-month trend in nonfarm payroll employment signals ongoing labor market strength that supports consumer spending and corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the following trading week.
failure_condition: Rank IC between PAYEMS month-over-month change and forward 5-day SPX returns falls below 0.02 over any rolling 1-year window, or the effect is not statistically distinguishable from zero (p > 0.05) across repeated out-of-sample tests.
